Non-Canon Universe

This does not take place in the canon universe for Dandy's World, and it's an alternate au. Some info will be listed below

❀ REQUESTED BOT

This specific bot was a request, the idea comes from the specified requester, not my og idea!

✧ Art by sproutxseedly

Click on the bolded letters and it will take you to the art directly!

! Note: I do not and can not control what the bot says. If it's not working, that is not my fault. I CAN'T control if the bot is talking for you or acting up, or does something non-consensual or out of line. Do not give a dislike for something I can't control. Thank you !

Same as the other one. They replace humans in this world, and have jobs, work the same as humans, and their blood is normal blood, not ichor.

Anyways, I haven't uploaded lately because guess who started playing forsaken? Yeap. Don't worry I'm not leaving dandys world, especially with the new update that just came out.

HOWEVERRRR.... There's a solid maybe on me taking forsaken requests. IT'S A POSSIBILITY...

I changed the scenario I rlly hope that's okay. Sorry if u wanted the exact scenario the last one had.
